title: APC UPS SNMP Input Voltage Fluctuation and Brownout Detection
dataSources: `index=power|cooling|environment` · `sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups"` (APC PowerNet / AirIR / ATS / NetBotz OIDs per deployment)
app: Splunk Connect for SNMP (SC4SNMP) or SNMP Modular Input; APC PowerNet-MIB / AirIR-MIB field extractions
spl:
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups" earliest=-24h
| eval vin=tonumber(coalesce(upsInputVoltage, upsAdvInputLineVoltage, input_voltage_v, ""))
| eval nom=tonumber(coalesce(nominal_input_voltage, "230"))
| eval pct_dev=abs(vin-nom)/nom*100
| where pct_dev>8
| timechart span=5m avg(vin) by ups_name
description: Sustained undervoltage stresses PSUs and drives unnecessary battery cycles.
value: Triggers utility tickets before chronic equipment wear.
implementation: (1) Normalize nominal voltage per region. (2) Correlate with ATS transfers.
visualization: Timechart input V; deviation alert band.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Power spikes during equipment power cycling, scheduled load shifting, or DR drills.
